creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Leo Vandewoestijne from comment #0)

FYI, there's is no pkg-plist in ports tree.

% ls -l /usr/ports/dns/packetq
total 1
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  185 May 26 03:45 distinfo
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  563 May 26 03:45 Makefile
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  333 May 26 03:45 pkg-descr
